extra.reason: Implemented SPEC-70.01 Beads doctor baseline with read-only Beads health detection, dp doctor JSON/text output, task_health enforcement replacing bd sync, updated docs and progress bootstrap guidance, and follow-up M7 backlog. Verified with dp doctor --json, trace validate/coverage, focused tests, lint, mypy, and UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache make check.

Moved jsonschema into runtime dependencies, refreshed uv.lock, reinstalled dp-codex as an editable uv tool, and verified dp resolves from /Users/rand/.local/bin, dp --help works outside the repo, dp doctor --json works in the repo, and UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache make check passes.

Implemented deterministic GoalContract lint with stable JSON and exit codes, golden fixtures, reference docs, SPEC-80.01, and ADR boundaries. Verified with dp goal lint tests/fixtures/goals/valid_spec_70_01.json --json, pytest tests/test_goal_lint.py tests/test_goal_state.py tests/test_goal_emit.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, and dp trace coverage --json.

Implemented append-only goal lifecycle state commands for status, claim, start, heartbeat, block, release, and evidence-pending complete over .dp/goals/events.jsonl. Verified with pytest tests/test_goal_state.py and make check.

Implemented Codex-operable goal emission via dp goal emit and dp agent prompt over valid GoalContracts, including lifecycle commands and evidence/no-self-report instructions. Verified with dp goal emit tests/fixtures/goals/valid_spec_70_01.json --format codex --json, pytest tests/test_goal_emit.py, and make check.

Updated README and documentation indexes/references for current SPEC-80 goal surfaces; added goal workflow runbook; clarified future campaign/evidence/runner work as not yet implemented; added goal-lint schema validation coverage. Verified with pytest tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Reframed README goal handoff examples around adopting repositories and moved the dp-codex SPEC-70.01 fixture into contributor smoke-test wording. Verified with make check, dp trace validate --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented deterministic EvidencePlan lint via dp evidence lint with documented schema, stable JSON and exit semantics, registered argv validation, timeout/success-code/assertion/mutation-policy checks, raw-shell rejection in argv entries, golden fixtures, output schema tests, README/runbook/reference/spec updates. Verified with dp evidence lint tests/fixtures/evidence/valid_spec_80_05.json --json, pytest tests/test_evidence_lint.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented deterministic LoopLedger lint/status/next with documented SPEC-80.04 schema, stable loop-lint JSON schema, acyclic dependency validation, valid GoalContract references, blocked and claimed node skipping, verified-event dependency unlocks, claim leases through existing goal events, and Codex package emission. Verified with dp loop lint tests/fixtures/loops/valid_spec_80_04.json --json, dp loop status tests/fixtures/loops/valid_spec_80_04.json --json, pytest tests/test_loop_ledger.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, dp verify --json, and dp doctor --json.

Implemented SPEC-70.07 Beads version-aware capability detection. dp doctor now parses bd version, does not run bd sync --help for Beads 1.0+ where sync is known removed, reports sync_command_available=false without stale warnings for current versions, and preserves sync probing for older or unparseable versions. Verified with pytest tests/unit/test_beads_provider.py tests/unit/test_cli_task.py, dp doctor --json, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate --json, dp trace coverage --json, and dp verify --json.

Implemented SPEC-80.06 CampaignManifest lint/status/recover with schema docs, golden fixtures, CLI tests, schema validation, deterministic artifact closure, read-only status/recover, and verified via targeted tests, make check, trace validation/coverage, and dp verify.

Implemented SPEC-80.07 conservative primary-spec campaign scaffold. dp campaign init --primary-spec <path> --write --json now hashes a local primary spec, extracts Markdown headings, writes draft CampaignManifest/LoopLedger/GoalContract/EvidencePlan artifacts plus needs_refinement markers, refuses changed-artifact overwrites, and lints generated artifacts without LLM calls, Beads writes, evidence execution, or semantic planning. Verified with pytest tests/test_campaign_init.py tests/test_campaign_manifest.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, temp-dir scaffold smoke, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, and dp verify.

Implemented SPEC-80.08 controlled evidence executor. Added SPEC, ADR update, stable evidence-run JSON schema, dp evidence run CLI, argv-only shell=False execution behind deterministic lint, controlled cwd/env, declared timeouts, typed assertions, denial fixtures, success/failure fixtures, schema tests, README/reference/runbook updates. Verified with dp evidence run tests/fixtures/evidence/valid_run_goal_lint.json --json, pytest tests/test_evidence_run.py tests/test_evidence_lint.py tests/unit/test_output_schemas.py, make test, make lint, make typecheck, make check, dp trace validate/coverage, dp verify, dp doctor, and bd --readonly status.
